name: Reconnaissance Activity
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jack Croock (method), Jonhnathan Ribeiro (improvements), oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Reconnaissance Activity
SIGMA Description: Detects activity as "net user administrator /domain" and "net group domain admins /domain"

False positives:
- Administrator activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4661 AND "Access Mask"='0x2d' AND ("Object Type" IN('SAM_USER', 'SAM_GROUP')) AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE 's-1-5-21-%' AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%-500' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%-512') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Reconnaissance Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4661 AND "Access Mask"='0x2d' AND ("Object Type" IN('SAM_USER', 'SAM_GROUP')) AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE 's-1-5-21-%' AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%-500' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%-512') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jack Croock (method), Jonhnathan Ribeiro (improvements), oscd.community SIGMA Title: Reconnaissance Activity SIGMA Description: Detects activity as "net user administrator /domain" and "net group domain admins /domain"  False positives: - Administrator activity  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
